title: Board committees
doc_html:
§2201.  Board committees

A board may create committees as needed to carry out its duties and responsibilities.

Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July 1, 2008.

§2201.  Board committees
A board may create committees as needed to carry out its duties and responsibilities.
Acts 2008, No. 743, §2, eff. July 1, 2008.
